goal: Model accuracy dropped 18% in the last 2 hours. SLA breach in 30 minutes. Investigate the system and identify the root cause. Use available actions: inspect, query_logs, check_metrics, submit_diagnosis.
alert_summary: [CRITICAL] Recommendation model accuracy: 0.69 (SLA: 0.80). Breach in 30 min. Triggered at 14:32 UTC.

api_gateway.description: Handles all incoming inference requests. Routes to model_server.

feature_store.description: Pre-computes and caches model features. Fed by data_pipeline_a and data_pipeline_b.

logs.msg: Received 340 null values in batch ID #9921, expected 0. Field: transaction_amount.
Null rate rising: 12% of incoming records missing transaction_amount
Null rate critical: 34% of records missing transaction_amount. Downstream models may degrade.

data_pipeline_a.description: Ingests user clickstream data. Feeds feature_store.

logs.msg: Schema validation passed. All fields nominal.

data_pipeline_b.description: Ingests transaction data from payment provider. Feeds feature_store. Schema migration was applied at 14:15 UTC.

logs.msg: Schema migration v2.3.1 applied. Field 'transaction_amount' type changed: FLOAT -> STRING.
Schema validation FAILED: feature_store expects FLOAT for 'transaction_amount', received STRING. Batch #9919 rejected.
Schema validation FAILED: Batch #9920 rejected. 1,020 records dropped.
Schema validation FAILED: Batch #9921 partially accepted. 340/1,000 records have null transaction_amount after coercion.
Cumulative data loss since 14:15 UTC: 3,420 records with corrupted transaction_amount. Notify on-call engineer.

model_server.description: Serves the recommendation model. Receives features from feature_store.

logs.msg: Feature vector incomplete for 12% of requests. Using default value 0.0 for transaction_amount.
Feature vector incomplete for 34% of requests. Prediction quality degraded.
Accuracy SLA breach: current accuracy 0.69, threshold 0.80.

monitoring_service.description: Tracks system health and fires alerts.

logs.msg: ALERT FIRED: model_accuracy below SLA. Current: 0.69. Notifying on-call team.

deployment_history.change: Schema migration v2.3.1: transaction_amount FLOAT -> STRING
deployment_history.author: infra-bot
